name: Abdomen CT With Contrast - Liver
description: Abdomen CT with contrast focused on liver evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the abdomen and pelvis with intravenous contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior cross-sectional imaging of the liver for comparison.

sections.name: Liver
sections.content:
The liver [is normal in size / shows diffuse fatty infiltration / shows no focal lesion]. Hepatic vasculature [is patent / no thrombosis or invasion].
No biliary dilation identified.

sections.name: Gallbladder
sections.content: The gallbladder [is present / contains no stones / shows no wall thickening]. No pericholecystic fluid.

sections.name: Biliary Ducts
sections.content: Intrahepatic bile ducts [are not dilated / no dilation]. Extrahepatic bile duct [is normal in caliber / measures __ mm].

sections.name: Pancreas
sections.content: The pancreas [is normal in size and contour / shows no mass or dilation of the pancreatic duct]. No acute pancreatitis.

sections.name: Spleen
sections.content: The spleen [is normal in size / no laceration or hemorrhage]. No abnormality.

sections.name: Kidneys
sections.content: Right kidney: [No hydronephrosis / No renal mass / Normal]. Left kidney: [No hydronephrosis / No renal mass / Normal].

impression:
1. [No hepatic mass or focal lesion /Liver is unremarkable].
2. [No abnormality identified / Recommend clinical correlation].
